creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Best European beach in 2024 ⭐️

📍Nissi Beach in Ayia Napa, Cyprus   I’ve been to Cyprus quite a few times as a kid and went back this April, and I agree that Nissi Beach is one of the best beaches in Europe 🙌

However, it’s also probably one of the most crowded beaches in Cyprus, and it’s not like the other small bays and more hidden beaches in the area are WAY worse than Nissi Beach…
 What is the best beach you’ve been to in Europe? 🏖️  #europetravel #nissibeach #cyprus #traveltips
